ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the company's CEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the date */,
  "split" REAL /* Stock split ratio on the date */,
  "change" REAL /* Daily price change */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Daily price change percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjusted_prices" (
  "adj_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjusted price entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding daily price entry */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price of the stock */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_volume" INTEGER /* Adjusted volume of shares traded */,
  "adj_change" REAL /* Adjusted daily price change */,
  "adj_change_percent" REAL /* Adjusted daily price change percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adj_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjusted_prices_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES daily_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend was declared */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend was recorded */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurred */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2.0 for a 2-for-1 split) */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the split was announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, trader) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock holding */,
  "return" REAL /* Return on the investment */,
  "return_percent" REAL /* Return percentage on the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
